heroHeadline: Israeli Army Conducts Overnight Raids Across Occupied West Bank
heroSubtitle: Israeli forces carried out overnight military raids across the occupied West Bank on April 12, 2026, continuing sustained operations in the territory. The total Palestinian death toll stands at 72,317. Only 21% of promised aid trucks have entered Gaza, and Phase 2 ceasefire talks remain deadlocked.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
